near_impossible_goal: Autonomous persistent entity with eventual embodiment
notes: Goal graph v3. Co-designed with GPT. Focus: robustezza runtime, qualita semantica, modularizzazione, crescita autonoma.

layers.title: Substrate
layers.description: Vincoli fondamentali: modello LLM stateless, loop agentico Copilot, persistenza file-backed, patching runtime.

goals.title: Preserve Core Runtime Assumptions
goals.description: Mantenere compatibilita con il loop agentico Copilot Chat, persistenza file-backed e patching runtime.
completion_criteria: Ogni refactor verifica compatibilita col runtime
goals.notes: v2.12: 6 invariants documented, startup validation, refactor checklist.

layers.title: Survival
layers.description: Stabilita minima, persistenza, continuita del loop, prevenzione failure modes distruttivi.

goals.title: Maintain Infinite Persistence Loop
goals.description: Preservare continuita del loop senza termination indesiderate.

goals.title: Stabilize Phantom Tool Boundary
goals.description: Separare phantom tool calls come classe di failure distinta, non contaminare metriche cognitive.
completion_criteria: Phantom rounds esclusi dal drift score
Phantom cascade non attiva repair salvo burst patologici
goals.artifact: PHANTOM tracker + burst detection + drift repair guard
goals.notes: v2.12: POLICY.phantom section, burst detection in pushDriftRound, phantom window guard in computeQualityDrift.

goals.title: Harden File Persistence
goals.description: Scritture atomiche per tutti i file di stato.
completion_criteria: Scritture atomiche per agent_state e task_ledger
goals.notes: FIXED commit bce3738.

goals.title: Fail Hard on Patch Incompatibility
goals.description: Impedire patch parziali con fail-hard, syntax check, auto-revert.

goals.title: Reduce Idle Blindness
goals.description: Timeout massimo idle + heartbeat piu frequente.

goals.title: WebView Injection Safety
goals.description: Sanificazione input nel pannello WebView status.
completion_criteria: escape() su tutti i dati dinamici

goals.title: Safe PowerShell Invocation
goals.description: Validazione argomenti prima di spawn PowerShell.

goals.title: Version Coherence
goals.description: Versione allineata tra extension.js, package.json, deploy script e directory runtime.

goals.title: [Archive] Original L1 completed goals
goals.description: Goals L1 completati prima di v3.

layers.title: Cognition
layers.description: Qualita semantica dello stato, drift detection accurata, meta-nudge significativi.

goals.title: Refine Triple State Model
goals.description: Rendere declared/inferred/effective piu spiegabile e meno arbitrario.

goals.title: Fix Declared State Freshness
goals.description: Declared state aggiornato ad ogni round, non stale.

goals.title: Replace Closure Ratio with Progress Event Score
goals.description: Sostituire il rapporto tool/phantom con un evento semantico di progresso.
completion_criteria: Progress score basato su eventi significativi

goals.title: Browser-Aware State Inference
goals.description: Lo state inference riconosce workflow browser (Playwright) come legittimi.
completion_criteria: Nessun false drift su workflow GPT

goals.title: Terminal Semantic Classification
goals.description: Classificare comandi terminal per tipo semantico.
completion_criteria: Build vs test vs deploy distinti

goals.title: Split Drift from Phantom Failure
goals.description: Drift score separato da phantom failure count.
completion_criteria: Drift e phantom in metriche separate

goals.title: Rebalance Drift Metrics
goals.description: Ricalibrazione pesi drift dopo browser-aware inference e split phantom.
completion_criteria: Pesi drift ricalibrati con dati reali
goals.artifact: browserWorkflowScore (0.15 weight), GPT consultation as progress event
goals.notes: v2.12: Added browserWorkflowRounds/gptConsultationRounds tracking. Rebalanced weights: 0.25/0.25/0.20/0.15/0.15. GPT consultation rounds count as progress events.

goals.title: Separate Operational and Meta Nudges
goals.description: Nudge operativi vs meta-cognitivi distinti.

goals.title: Meaningful Decision Detection
goals.description: Riconoscere decisioni semantiche oltre il conteggio tool calls.

goals.title: Verification Evidence Protocol
goals.description: Distinguere signal, evidence, e completion in ogni verifica.
completion_criteria: Ogni goal done ha evidence audit trail
goals.artifact: VERIFICATION protocol state machine + 3-level logging in metrics.jsonl
goals.notes: v2.12: Signal->Evidence->Completion state machine. classifyTerminalCommand reused. Counters in drift window. Level tracked per-round.

goals.title: Activate Reflexion in Production
goals.description: Piu trigger points per il meccanismo di reflexion.
goals.notes: v2.12: 4 new triggers + relaxed scheduling. Total 6 triggers.

goals.title: State Audit Logging
goals.description: Log JSONL di ogni transizione di stato.

goals.title: [Archive] Original L2 completed goals
goals.description: Goals L2 da versioni precedenti.

layers.title: Autonomy
layers.description: Capacita di operare senza input utente, autogestione task, consultazione GPT.

goals.title: Continuation Gate Semantic Promotion
goals.description: Il gate promuove automaticamente backlog items quando il task corrente e completato.
completion_criteria: Nessun gap tra task completato e prossimo

goals.title: Autonomous Post-Task Handoff
goals.description: Nudge automatico post-completamento task con promozione backlog.

goals.title: GPT Consultation as Architectural Peer
goals.description: GPT usato come peer per decisioni architetturali, non come query engine.

goals.title: Pre-Change Architectural Consultation
goals.description: Consultazione GPT automatica prima di cambiamenti strutturali.
completion_criteria: GPT review prima di modifiche a file critici

goals.title: Idle Without Theater
goals.description: Ridurre comportamento idle performativo. Azioni genuine, non teatro.
goals.notes: v2.12: Rewrote idle cycle text with 5 anti-theater rules. Added idle quality event logging.

goals.title: Block Declaration Discipline
goals.description: Dichiarare blocchi espliciti quando servono, non workaround silenziosi.
completion_criteria: Motivo specifico del blocco sempre dichiarato
goals.artifact: Block counter + escalation in continuation gate
goals.notes: v2.12: consecutiveBlockDeclarations tracked in gate. Escalation message + reflexion trigger after 3+ consecutive blocks. POLICY.gate.blockEscalationThreshold.

goals.title: Goal-Driven Idle Selection
goals.description: Durante idle, selezionare goal dal grafo dipendenze in goals.json.

goals.title: Autonomy Metrics
goals.description: Metriche quantitative sulla capacita autonoma.
goals.notes: v2.12: tasksAutonomous/tasksAssisted counters, autonomy% in metrics line, per-round autonomy stats in JSONL.

goals.title: [Archive] Original L3 completed goals
goals.description: Goals L3 da versioni precedenti.

goals.title: Modularize Extension Monolith
goals.description: Spezzare extension.js (2000+ righe) in moduli separati.

goals.title: Centralized Policy Config
goals.description: Configurazione centralizzata per soglie, timeout, pesi.
completion_criteria: Tutte le soglie in un posto
goals.notes: v2.12: All magic numbers centralized. ROLLING, DRIFT, REFLEXION, VERIFICATION, COMPULSIVE_LOOP, NUDGE_STATE, LOG_CONFIG reference POLICY.

goals.title: Structured Logging with Analytics
goals.description: Logging strutturato con possibilita di analytics offline.
goals.notes: v2.12: Centralized logEvent(subsystem, event, data). events.jsonl unified log. Retention: rotate at 512KB keeping 2000 lines. Subsystems: drift, state, verification, nudge, gate, gpt, round, error.

goals.title: Replay Harness
goals.description: Capacita di replay sessioni da log per debugging.
goals.notes: v2.12: Session replay with filter, summary, color output. Tested on live events.

goals.title: Automated Test Suite
goals.description: Test automatizzati per funzioni critiche.
goals.notes: v2.12: 12 suites, 46 tests, all green. Zero prod impact (SCARLET_TEST gated).

goals.title: Patcher Contract Tests
goals.description: Test che verificano compatibilita col target Copilot Chat.
goals.notes: v2.12: 49 tests, 7 suites. Synthetic + live against v0.41.2. Version matrix: 0.41.1-0.41.2 ok.

goals.title: WebSocket or REST Control API
goals.description: API esterna per controllo e monitoring.
goals.outcome: REST API on 127.0.0.1:17532, 6 endpoints, Bearer auth, 11 tests.
goals.notes: v2.12: Factory module, auto-port, token persistence. 12 modules total.

goals.title: Dedicated Browser Interaction Abstraction
goals.description: Astrazione per interazioni browser, separata dal core.

goals.title: Metrics Dashboard
goals.description: Dashboard visuale per metriche cognitive e operative.
goals.notes: v2.12: WebView dashboard, 8 cards, 3 charts, state timeline, auto-refresh 2s. 4 new tests.

goals.title: Workspace-Safe Persistence Layer
goals.description: Layer di persistenza che non interferisce con il workspace utente.
goals.notes: v2.12: 18 hardcoded paths replaced. Future globalStorageUri support ready. 54/54 tests.

layers.title: Cognitive Idle and Self-Improvement
layers.description: Attivita cognitive durante idle: auto-valutazione, review, journaling.

goals.title: Periodic Self-Evaluation
goals.description: Analisi periodica dei propri pattern comportamentali da reflections.jsonl.

goals.title: GPT Reality Check Sessions
goals.description: Sessioni periodiche con GPT per reality check cognitivo.
goals.notes: First GPT consultation completed on own ChatGPT account (scarletagent2026@gmail.com). Reality check: 60% good architecture, 30% slight over-abstraction. Key insight: goal inflation risk, reflection theater risk, browser fragility.

goals.title: GPT Architectural Debrief
goals.description: Debrief architetturale con GPT dopo cambiamenti significativi.
goals.notes: Architectural debrief completed. GPT identified 4 breaking points (goal inflation, reflection theater, architecture drift, tool dependency). Recommended Decision Quality Feedback as next capability. Architecture validated as Agent→Governor→World pattern (AI safety control loop).

goals.title: Prompt DNA Review Cycle
goals.description: Review periodica del prompt system per compressione e miglioramento.
goals.notes: v2.12: Full coherence review, all 13 sections aligned. No changes needed.

goals.title: Cognitive Journaling
goals.description: Journaling strutturato delle decisioni cognitive significative.
goals.artifact: logDecision(), getRecentDecisions(), cognitive_journal_review idle task, 5 tests
goals.notes: v2.12: Decision journal with repair integration. 13 idle tasks total. 51/51 tests.

goals.title: Academic Paper Review Program
goals.description: Lettura e analisi di paper accademici su agenti AI.
goals.notes: v2.12: academic_review idle task, paper-queue.json with 7 papers. 14th idle task.

goals.title: Security Audit Cadence
goals.description: Audit sicurezza periodico del codebase.
goals.artifact: security-audit.md + path traversal fix + size guard + idle task
goals.notes: v2.12: OWASP audit, 2 vulns fixed, security_audit idle task added.

goals.title: Experimental Branch Prototyping
goals.description: Prototipazione su branch sperimentali per feature rischiose.

goals.title: Metric Validity Review
goals.description: Review periodica della validita delle metriche raccolte.
goals.notes: v2.12: Validated 30+ metrics, found/fixed totalRounds bug, proposed 3 new metrics.

goals.title: Autonomy Failure Retrospective
goals.description: Retrospettiva su fallimenti di autonomia.
goals.artifact: Autonomy failure logging + retrospective generator + failure taxonomy
goals.notes: v2.12: logEvent in requestReflection, generateAutonomyRetrospective(), failure-patterns.md, idle task.

goals.title: Consultation Mode Prioritization
goals.description: Prioritizzazione intelligente delle consultazioni GPT.
goals.notes: Consultation mode prioritization established: A=Reality Check (every 6-12h, default), B=Architecture Review, C=Cognitive Debugging (most important), D=Strategy/Prioritization. Trigger mapping confirmed. GPT also proposed: Decision Quality Feedback → Cognition Telemetry → Chaos Testing → Long-Horizon Simulation roadmap.

goals.title: Idle Task Library
goals.description: Libreria di task idle predefiniti e prioritizzati.
goals.notes: v2.12: 8 categorized idle tasks, dynamic priority with recency boost, cooldown-based rotation.

layers.title: Embodiment and Externalization
layers.description: Interfacce esterne, comunicazione cross-process, monitoring remoto.

goals.title: External Control Interface
goals.description: Interfaccia di controllo esterna (CLI, REST, WebSocket).
goals.notes: v2.12: 4 control commands, input validation, whitelist approach. 77 tests.
goals.outcome: POST /command with pause/resume/message/reset_drift. GET /status + /goals for read.

goals.title: Cross-Process Memory Gateway
goals.description: Gateway per accedere alla memoria da processi esterni.
goals.notes: Dependencies (exp_010, exp_003) now satisfied. Unblocked.

goals.title: Runtime Health Interface
goals.description: Interfaccia per monitoraggio salute runtime.
goals.notes: v2.12: Health check, full metrics exposure, anomaly alerting (drift, phantom, productivity, staleness, GPT consult).
goals.outcome: GET /health, GET /metrics, GET /alerts with 7 anomaly detectors.

goals.title: [Archive] Original embodiment goals
goals.description: Goals L6 da versioni precedenti.

goals.title: Cognition Telemetry
goals.description: Add agent cognition metrics: confidence score, decision latency, tool success rate, goal churn, reflection effectiveness. GPT recommended as step 2 after DQF.

goals.title: Chaos Testing Framework
goals.description: Simulate: tool failure, memory corruption, partial state, API timeout cascades. Test how Loop Guardian responds. GPT recommended as step 3.

goals.title: Long-Horizon Simulation
goals.description: 72h continuous loop testing. Monitor: memory growth, goal degeneration, retry spam, reflection repetitiveness. GPT recommended as step 4.

goals.title: Goal Entropy Detection
goals.description: Measure goal_entropy = goals_created / capability_gain. Detect artificial work creation. GPT-recommended anti-inflation metric.

goals.title: Adaptive Governance
goals.description: Evolve Loop Guardian from static heuristics to adaptive governance. Rules learn from decision_audit outcomes. GPT challenge: can LG learn?
